name: J0456-6533
thesis_note: typed Ia (TN) from Z24 + XMM analysis (Shukla 2024)

name: J0500-6512
thesis_note: Y21 optical candidate confirmed as MCSNR by Shukla 2024 (XMM-Newton follow-up; thesis sec. 7.2.1); [SII]/Ha=0.81

name: J0614-7251
thesis_note: eROSITA SNR candidate (Zangrandi+24) confirmed as an LMC SNR by Sasaki+25 (2025A&A...693L..15S): environment density and X-ray properties similar to the known LMC SNR population.

name: J0624-6948
thesis_note: SNR candidate (Filipovic+22; Zangrandi+24) confirmed as an LMC SNR by Sasaki+25 (2025A&A...693L..15S): radio shell spectral index and polarisation typical of an SNR; low-density environment, n0 < 0.01 cm^-3.
